creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
The worst thing about travelling in Thailand 👇  I’ve been to Thailand 4 times, and I’m sure I’ll come back again as there’s so much to explore 🇹🇭   But sometimes the cultural differences get a bit challenging - especially when it comes to transportation from A to B 😅

It may very well be because when you’re travelling, you can sometimes get into a bit of a “holiday mood” where you shut down parts of your brain, and perhaps the fantastic Thai people are so used to us Western tourists not understanding how things work in Thailand 😀

But taking a bus, ferry, or any transfer in Thailand is sometimes a bit challenging. 

You won’t get much information - suddenly there may be a change in schedule, your boat has been delayed 2 hours, or you might get dropped off and need to change bus without getting any information about what’s going on 😆

It’s definitely something to be aware of if you’re coming to Thailand for the first time - you won’t get much information along the way, but it usually always works out, in the end 🥰  I love Thailand and the Thai people, so I’m not trying to point fingers at the people working in the tourism industry in Thailand - just wanted to share this as it was something that surprised me on my first trip to Thailand 7 years ago ✌️

#thailand #thailandtravel #travellife
